ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pets" (
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pet */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the submitter who surrendered the pet */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the pet (e.g., Rabbit, Hedgehog) */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the pet (e.g., Cinnamon rabbit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pet's characteristics */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the pet (M/F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the pet in years */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the pet was submitted for adoption */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the pet */,
  "spay_neuter_status" TEXT /* Spay or neuter status of the pet */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the pet's microchip */,
  "adoption_status" TEXT /* Current adoption status of the pet (e.g., available, pending adoption, adopted) */,
  "last_health_check" TEXT /* Date of the last health check-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pets_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitters" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submitter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the submitter */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the submitter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the submitter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the submitter */,
  "submission_count" INTEGER /* Number of pets submitted by the submitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet receiving the vaccination */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine administered */,
  "administered_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccine was administered */,
  "administered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who administered the vaccine */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next booster shot is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_administered_by FOREIGN KEY ("administered_by") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoptions" (
  "adoption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being adopted */,
  "adopter_name" TEXT /* Name of the individual adopting the pet */,
  "adoption_date" TEXT /* Date when the adoption occurred */,
  "adoption_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the adoption */,
  "adopter_address" TEXT /* Address of the adopter */,
  "adopter_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the adopter */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoptions_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., admin, veterinarian) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the staff member */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the staff member belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet associated with the medical record */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition diagnosed */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment recommended for the condition */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date treatment was administered */,
  "administered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who administered the treatment */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether follow-up treatment is required */,
  "next_follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_administered_by FOREIGN KEY ("administered_by") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoption_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet for adoption application */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the individual applying for adoption */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "adopter_address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "adopter_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "reason_for_adoption" TEXT /* Reason provided by the applicant for adopting the pet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_applications_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)
